name: com.infinix.xshare
label: Xshare
description: XShare Its app for Transfer & Share files, also has ads.

name: com.transsion.XOSLauncher
label: Xoslauncher
description: Launcher with ads, tracking. After remove you will lose recent apps.

name: com.transsion.aftersalecalibrationtool
label: Aftersalecalibrationtool
description: Hidden camera tests, calibration.

name: com.transsion.agingfunction
label: Agingfunction
description: Another test mode, aging setting. secret code 2828, 2829, 2830

name: com.transsion.aisettings
label: Aisettings
description: Adds a shortcut on the Settings app that lets you manage your Folax AI (com.transsion.aivoiceassistant) settings. If you have already removed that package, it just displays a blank page. This can also be safely removed without issues.

name: com.transsion.aivoiceassistant
label: Aivoiceassistant
description: Very shady voice assistant called 'Folax' that comes preinstalled in Infinix phones, and is also packed with ads in the main ui. It needs every permission, and access to everything on your phone to run. It uses OpenAI as its backend. It constantly runs in the background after boot, and periodically phones home. You don't want this on your phone. This can be safely removed without issues.

name: com.transsion.aiwallpaper
label: Aiwallpaper
description: Mediocre AI Wallpaper Generator. Can be accessed from (Settings > Personalization). You can safely remove this without any issues if you don't use it.

name: com.transsion.aod
label: Aod
description: AlwaysOnDisplay

name: com.transsion.applock
label: Lock
description: AppLock Provides the only way to hide files and lock apps when using Transsion launchers (which the Transsion devices require for certain functionality like multiapps not working with other launchers). These are the only apps that hide files and lock apps with them. Removal breaks recents.

name: com.transsion.audioshare
label: Audioshare
description: Audio Share Allows you to share your device’s Bluetooth audio with wireless headphones or bluetooth speakers, allowing to listen to the same music with multiple people Pithus analysis: https://beta.pithus.org/report/0f21ba3944663e53da1d37be3c4253c2e89c3685fbff841127fed2a98e0000ec

name: com.transsion.auto

name: com.transsion.avatar
label: Avatar
description: Is this for T-moji avatar services? it's useless.

name: com.transsion.batterylab
label: Batterylab
description: Supposed to improve battery life but logs especially lots of usage info and bind it to your unique android advertiser id...The app tries to send data to a server. The POST request URL and content is obfuscated and I don't have the time to dig deeper. According to a user, no battery impact after months of usage after uninstalling it. Pithus analysis: https://beta.pithus.org/report/7ef2b186a74102828346f23b094ab2aaaad2c57806c7c18e7a23a494f3cc982c

name: com.transsion.dirac
label: Dirac
description: Improves audio quality depending on your surrounding environment and your headphones. Has the GET_TASKS/REAL_GET_TASKS permission which allows it to retrieve information about currently and recently running processes. Not sure why it needs this permission though. https://www.dirac.com/ Pithus analysis: https://beta.pithus.org/report/b2cf41f579c586468faa0270bf63699cca2b500887dba3a699ddd5e35507a1a9

name: com.transsion.dtsaudio

name: com.transsion.filemanagerx
label: Filemanagerx
description: File Manager App (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.transsion.filemanagerx) Comes with 3 analytics/ads trackers (https://reports.exodus-privacy.eu.org/fr/reports/com.transsion.filemanagerx/latest/) It doesn't break anything upon disable, and uses telemetry. Similar to Google Files. Probably safe to disable. Further testing needed.

name: com.transsion.fmradio
label: Fmradio
description: WOW FM App for FM RADIO.

name: com.transsion.hamal
label: Hamal
description: It seems to be an "aftersales user experience logging app". Really shady app with questionable code (judgeWhiteUser() function. See https://github.com/0x192/universal-android-debloater/pull/112). Start at boot and can access phone number and IMEI (READ_PHONE_STATE). Pithus analysis: https://beta.pithus.org/report/35fd79ebbe51808196605146a62aaef13bc654477d917078a3ae5d3f06ba8836

name: com.transsion.health
label: Health
description: Tecno health app. Sends your personal data to Firebase google servers and Tecno servers. Those data can be shared with TRANSSION affiliated companies (see https://cdn.shalltry.com/transsionholdings/en/policy.html) Pithus analysis: https://beta.pithus.org/report/2b7cd35081a9fbc82a1da1741cb476d1edaa3262d46a204ea8456c99c4e1b976

name: com.transsion.healthlife

name: com.transsion.hiparty
label: Hiparty
description: Hi Party Allows you to synchronize and play the same song across multiple *supported* devices. The app creates a wifi hotspot. You can connect up to 6 devices via QR code to simultaneously broadcast music. Needs permissions you probably doesn't want to give : READ_PHONE_STATE (can read phone number and IMEI) and ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION. label: Magicfont

name: com.transsion.magicshow

name: com.transsion.manualguide

name: com.transsion.microintelligence
label: Microintelligence
description: Micro Intelligence Provides features like tap to awake, awake on device raise, etc. Disabling this app makes you unable to use specific settings like Gesture Navigation and Action & Gesture along with other phone features. name: com.transsion.phonemaster
label: Phonemaster
description: Phone Master. Provides features like ram cleaning, storage optimisation, data usage analyser, etc. Has embedded Facebook and Google ads trackers. Has 45 permissions and makes request data to many different companies servers. There even is the usesCleartextTraffic=true flag in the Manifest meaning trafic may not even be encrypted Pithus analysis: https://beta.pithus.org/report/a5346fb5ea4fba5b73a891eae064b2bdecefbc7de4f9a13e3dcf94b0a81a20af

name: com.transsion.plat.appupdate

Notables permissions: ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION and GET_TASKS (allows to see which apps are running on the phone).
